basic_details.job_title: DCPU Chengalpattu Case Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu) Case Worker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website chengalpattu.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DCPU Chengalpattu Case Worker Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th passed from a recognized Board / Equivalent Board, Good Communication Skills
qualification.details: Case Worker: 12th passed from a recognized Board / Equivalent Board. Good Communication Skills. Weightage for experienced candidates. Preference may be given to personnel working in Emergency Helplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Case Worker Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Chengalpattu Case Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Case Worker post is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Case Worker position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Case Worker post in the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Case Worker role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 12th grade from a recognized Board or an equivalent board and possess good communication skills.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Case Worker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Case Worker position is 42 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 18,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Chengalpattu Case Worker recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates need to be attached.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.
